createPost.title: New topic
createPost.subtitle: Pick a category and write your content. Submissions stay pending until a moderator approves them.
createPost.pendingNote: After you submit, moderators will review. You can keep browsing published topics in the forum.
createPost.noticeAttachments: Image and file attachments for forum posts are not supported yet (the API accepts plain text and tags only).
createPost.noticeMentions: @username mentions and notifications are not implemented yet.
createPost.noticeChat: Real-time messaging: the backend includes a Chat module and SignalR hub, but the /chat route in the web app is still a placeholder — the inbox UI is not wired up yet.

fields.title: Title
fields.tagPicker: Tags — pick suggestions or add your own
fields.noSuggestedTags: No suggested tags yet. Add tags using the field below.
fields.addCustomTags: Add more tags (press Enter to add each)

validation.required: Please enter both title and content.
validation.submitFailed: Could not submit. Please try again.

form.title: Title
form.minTitleLength: Title must be at least 10 characters
form.minContentLength: Content must be at least 50 characters

commentSection.title: Comments
commentSection.noComments: No comments yet. Be the first!
commentSection.author: Author

empty.noPostsDescription: Be the first to share your knowledge

error.notFoundDescription: The post may have been deleted or you don't have access

confirm.delete: Are you sure you want to delete this post?

index.title: Discussion zones
index.subtitle: Grouped by purpose: academic, community, official news, and career — similar to VOZ section layout.
index.noPostsYet: No posts in this section yet

zones.officialDesc: Announcements, feedback, and official updates from moderators.
zones.academicDesc: Study materials, Q&A, programming and tech.
zones.communityDesc: General chat, student life, casual discussion.

sidebar.notice: Note: new content is updated in real time.

reportModal.title: Report this post
reportModal.subtitle: Moderators will review your report. Optional details help us act faster.

feedback.loginRequired: Please sign in to perform this action.
feedback.commentCooldown: Please wait a few seconds before posting another comment.
feedback.commentFailed: Unable to submit comment. Please try again.
feedback.reportFailed: Unable to submit report right now.
feedback.pinCommentFailed: Unable to update comment pin state.
feedback.shareUnavailable: Cannot copy link in this browser.
feedback.facebookShareReady: Post content and link copied. Paste it into your Facebook share text.

saved.title: Saved posts
saved.empty: You have no saved posts yet.

threads.title: Thread board
threads.subtitle: Topic-first discussions. Open a thread and continue conversation in comments.
threads.empty: No posts in this thread channel yet. Create a post and pick this channel (e.g. General Thread); after approval it will show up here.

threadMode.description: This topic is comment-first. Continue discussion in replies to keep context in one place.
threadMode.point1: The original post is only context to open the topic; the main content lives in comments.
threadMode.point2: Discussion flow is preserved via nested replies instead of splitting into many new posts.
threadMode.point3: Best for long multi-opinion discussions; regular posts are better for announcements or complete writeups.
threadMode.replyLabel: Add your take to this thread
threadMode.replyPlaceholder: Write your thoughts to continue this discussion...

mod.pendingPostsHint: Open «Details» to read the full post and use the AI moderation hint in the side panel.

pendingDetail.aiDisclaimer: Suggestions are advisory; moderators make the final decision.

detail.fallbackContent: This discussion highlights key updates from the forum thread. Open comments below for follow-up points and additional context from members.
detail.sampleComment1: Thanks for sharing. I agree this should be prioritized for the next sprint.
detail.sampleComment2: Could you add more details about expected timeline and impact?

explore.title: Explore Discussions
explore.subtitle: Discover new ideas, ask questions, and collaborate with the community.
explore.mockThread1: How to ace the upcoming computer architecture exam?
explore.mockThread2: Looking for a study group for Advanced Calculus
